rationale: The citing paper references Wansink and Chandon (2006) only in the General Discussion as part of a grouped citation to support a brief implication that calorie counting may backfire by encouraging additional indulgence. The cited work is not used to develop the psychophysical model, motivate hypotheses, specify methods, or interpret the core empirical findings across Studies 1-4. Its role is therefore peripheral supportive background rather than a meaningful building block in the paper's argument.
